base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hammer_bro_throw — a character from 1985 super mario bros. Throw pose — one arm raised with hammer about to release. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Throw pose — one arm raised with hammer about to release; brief 2-3 frames per throw cycle
